title: Taklee Genesis x Worlds Collide
original_title: ตาคลี เจเนซิส
overview: A time-travel adventure that takes place during the Cold War when a US military base in Thailand was testing the Taklee Genesis, a warp-speed teleporter even though it had not yet been fully developed. After the war, the Taklee Genesis was left behind in Thailand and was being illegally used by someone.

trailers.title: Official Final Trailer [Subtitled]
trailers.channel_name: เนรมิตรหนัง ฟิล์ม Neramitnung Film

trailers.title: Visually stunning and genre-bending mix between time travel sci-fi film and creature feature.
Are you ready for a mind-blowing journey through space and time?
